import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + n
    count = count + 1
    i = i + 1
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  print("avg=#{avg}")
end
